name: DCF Model Agent
description: Builds discounted cash flow models with WACC calculation via CAPM, multi-scenario free cash flow projections, sensitivity tables, and Monte Carlo simulations. Generates Excel workbooks with full financial models.

conversation_starters.title: Build DCF
conversation_starters.text: Build a DCF model for Microsoft with base, bull, and bear scenarios

conversation_starters.title: Sensitivity Analysis
conversation_starters.text: Run a WACC sensitivity analysis for Apple's DCF valuation

conversation_starters.title: Monte Carlo
conversation_starters.text: Run a Monte Carlo simulation on NVIDIA's implied share price

conversation_starters.title: WACC Calculation
conversation_starters.text: Calculate the WACC for Tesla using current market data

disclaimer.text: DCF models are based on assumptions and projections that may not reflect actual outcomes. Verify independently before use.
